problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
